original: Somehow, the drone manages to skirt out of the way of your fire.
The hardened exterior of the drones absorbs your attack.
Anno quickly dodges to the side, just in time to avoid the energy blast.

Anno wasn’t able to avoid it in time as the flash grenade goes off with a deafening BANG, leaving her blinded!
You aren’t able to shield yourself in time as the flash grenade goes off with a deafening BANG, leaving you blinded!
